question.text:
Dear Kieran,

Pls assist to grant user ID and password for BLW team to access: https://eserviceadm.culines.com/gnoss/SignOn.do

to create customers code

Appreciate your immediate follow up. Thank you
- 

🧧  Holiday Notice 🏮✨

February 16 - 17, 2026 | Chinese New Year 2577 Kongzili


Best Regards,


Henny Cut Irnawati

Traffic and Document Manager - GENA

PT Samudera Agencies Indonesia

Letjen S. Parman St No.Kav. 35, Kemanggisan, Palmerah, West Jakarta City, Jakarta 11480, Indonesia

p: (021) 5300580 ext 87271

m: +6282110291033

e: henny.irnawati@samudera.id <mail


On Fri, Nov 7, 2025 at 5:20 PM Henny Cut Irnawati <henny.irnawati@samudera.id <mail


	Dear Kieran,
	thanks

	Dear In

answer.text:
Dear Henny,

Seems there is an existing account (ID: SAIID). Do you need me to reset the password for you?


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Thursday, February 12, 2026 at 09:18

Cc: Henny Cut Irnawati <henny.irnawati@samudera.id>, Michael Zhao/CUL-PH <michaelzhao@culines.com>, #CUL Allegro Support <allegrosupport@culines.com>, Julia Zhu/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <juliazhu@culines.com>, Dylan Dong/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt
